targets.rawSql: SELECT count(DISTINCT SpanAttributes['campaign_id']) as campaigns FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND SpanName = 'agent.research' AND SpanAttributes['campaign_id'] != ''
SELECT count() as emails FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND SpanName = 'draft.email'

SELECT countIf(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.evaluation.score.label'] = 'passed') / nullIf(count(), 0) as pass_rate FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND SpanName = 'evaluate.draft' AND SpanAttributes['gen_ai.evaluation.score.label'] != ''
$increase(Value) FROM infraspec.otel_metrics_sum WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND MetricName = 'gen_ai.client.cost'
SELECT 1 - countIf(StatusCode = 'Error') / nullIf(count(), 0) as success_rate FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND SpanName LIKE 'agent.%'

SELECT Attributes['gen_ai.provider.name'] as provider, argMax(Value, TimeUnix) - argMin(Value, TimeUnix) as cost FROM infraspec.otel_metrics_sum WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND MetricName = 'gen_ai.client.cost' AND Attributes['gen_ai.provider.name'] != '' GROUP BY provider ORDER BY cost DESC

SELECT $timeSeries as t, count(DISTINCT SpanAttributes['campaign_id']) as campaigns FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND SpanName = 'agent.research' AND SpanAttributes['campaign_id'] != '' GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

SELECT $timeSeries as t, countIf(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.evaluation.score.label'] = 'passed') / nullIf(count(), 0) as quality_pct FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND SpanName = 'evaluate.draft' AND SpanAttributes['gen_ai.evaluation.score.label'] != '' GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

SELECT sum(Sum) / nullIf(sum(Count), 0) as avg_input FROM infraspec.otel_metrics_histogram WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND MetricName = 'gen_ai.client.token.usage' AND Attributes['gen_ai.token.type'] = 'input'

SELECT sum(Sum) / nullIf(sum(Count), 0) as avg_output FROM infraspec.otel_metrics_histogram WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND MetricName = 'gen_ai.client.token.usage' AND Attributes['gen_ai.token.type'] = 'output'

panels.title: Quality per Token
panels.description: Average quality score normalized by input tokens consumed

targets.rawSql: SELECT q.avg_score / nullIf(t.avg_input, 0) as quality_per_token FROM (SELECT avg(toFloat64OrZero(SpanAttributes['quality_score'])) as avg_score FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND SpanName = 'evaluate.draft' AND SpanAttributes['quality_score'] != '') q, (SELECT sum(Sum) / nullIf(sum(Count), 0) as avg_input FROM infraspec.otel_metrics_histogram WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND MetricName = 'gen_ai.client.token.usage' AND Attributes['gen_ai.token.type'] = 'input') t

SELECT c.total_cost / nullIf(q.avg_score, 0) as cost_per_quality FROM (SELECT argMax(Value, TimeUnix) - argMin(Value, TimeUnix) as total_cost FROM infraspec.otel_metrics_sum WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND MetricName = 'gen_ai.client.cost') c, (SELECT avg(toFloat64OrZero(SpanAttributes['quality_score'])) as avg_score FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND SpanName = 'evaluate.draft' AND SpanAttributes['quality_score'] != '') q

panels.title: Input vs Output Tokens by Agent

targets.rawSql: SELECT a.agent, a.input_tokens, b.output_tokens FROM (SELECT Attributes['gen_ai.agent.name'] as agent, sum(Sum) as input_tokens FROM infraspec.otel_metrics_histogram WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND MetricName = 'gen_ai.client.token.usage' AND Attributes['gen_ai.token.type'] = 'input' AND Attributes['gen_ai.agent.name'] != '' GROUP BY agent) a LEFT JOIN (SELECT Attributes['gen_ai.agent.name'] as agent, sum(Sum) as output_tokens FROM infraspec.otel_metrics_histogram WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND MetricName = 'gen_ai.client.token.usage' AND Attributes['gen_ai.token.type'] = 'output' AND Attributes['gen_ai.agent.name'] != '' GROUP BY agent) b ON a.agent = b.agent ORDER BY a.input_tokens DESC

SELECT t.agent, t.avg_input, t.avg_output, c.cost_per_req FROM (SELECT Attributes['gen_ai.agent.name'] as agent, sum(Sum) / nullIf(sum(Count), 0) as avg_input, sumIf(Sum, Attributes['gen_ai.token.type'] = 'output') / nullIf(sumIf(Count, Attributes['gen_ai.token.type'] = 'output'), 0) as avg_output FROM infraspec.otel_metrics_histogram WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND MetricName = 'gen_ai.client.token.usage' AND Attributes['gen_ai.agent.name'] != '' GROUP BY agent) t LEFT JOIN (SELECT Attributes['gen_ai.agent.name'] as agent, (argMax(Value, TimeUnix) - argMin(Value, TimeUnix)) / nullIf(sum(Count), 0) as cost_per_req FROM infraspec.otel_metrics_sum WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND MetricName = 'gen_ai.client.cost' AND Attributes['gen_ai.agent.name'] != '' GROUP BY agent) c ON t.agent = c.agent ORDER BY t.avg_input DESC

SELECT SpanAttributes['gen_ai.request.model'] as model, count() as total_requests, avg(Duration / 1000000000) as avg_latency_s, countIf(StatusCode = 'Error') / nullIf(count(), 0) as error_rate FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND SpanName LIKE 'gen_ai.chat%' AND SpanAttributes['gen_ai.request.model'] != '' GROUP BY model ORDER BY total_requests DESC

$columns(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.request.model'] as model, avg(Duration / 1000000000) as avg_s) FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND SpanName LIKE 'gen_ai.chat%' AND SpanAttributes['gen_ai.request.model'] != '' GROUP BY t, model ORDER BY t

panels.title: Token Usage by Model Over Time

targets.rawSql: $columns(Attributes['gen_ai.request.model'] as model, sum(Sum) as tokens) FROM infraspec.otel_metrics_histogram WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND MetricName = 'gen_ai.client.token.usage' AND Attributes['gen_ai.request.model'] != '' GROUP BY t, model ORDER BY t

panels.title: Where Time Goes (Avg Pipeline)
panels.description: Average time spent in each agent as percentage of total pipeline

targets.rawSql: SELECT replaceAll(SpanName, 'agent.', '') as agent, avg(Duration / 1000000000) as avg_s FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND SpanName LIKE 'agent.%' GROUP BY agent ORDER BY avg_s DESC

$columns(replaceAll(SpanName, 'agent.', '') as agent, avg(Duration / 1000000000) as avg_s) FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND SpanName LIKE 'agent.%' GROUP BY t, agent ORDER BY t
SELECT $timeSeries as t, avg(Duration / 1000000000) as llm_time FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND SpanName LIKE 'gen_ai.chat%' GROUP BY t ORDER BY t
SELECT $timeSeries as t, avg(Duration / 1000000000) as pipeline_time FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND SpanName LIKE 'agent.%' GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

SELECT replaceAll(SpanName, 'agent.', '') as agent, quantile(0.5)(Duration / 1000000000) as p50, quantile(0.9)(Duration / 1000000000) as p90, quantile(0.99)(Duration / 1000000000) as p99 FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND SpanName LIKE 'agent.%' GROUP BY agent ORDER BY p50 DESC

SELECT c.total_cost / nullIf(e.emails, 0) as cost_per_email FROM (SELECT argMax(Value, TimeUnix) - argMin(Value, TimeUnix) as total_cost FROM infraspec.otel_metrics_sum WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND MetricName = 'gen_ai.client.cost') c, (SELECT count() as emails FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND SpanName = 'draft.email') e
SELECT avg(Duration / 1000000000) as avg_pipeline_s FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND SpanName = 'agent.research'

SELECT e.emails / nullIf(c.campaigns, 0) as emails_per_campaign FROM (SELECT count() as emails FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND SpanName = 'draft.email') e, (SELECT count(DISTINCT SpanAttributes['campaign_id']) as campaigns FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND SpanName = 'agent.research' AND SpanAttributes['campaign_id'] != '') c

SELECT avg(toFloat64OrZero(SpanAttributes['icp_score'])) as avg_icp FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND SpanName = 'score.prospect' AND SpanAttributes['icp_score'] != ''

SELECT SpanAttributes['campaign_id'] as campaign_id, count() as emails, countIf(StatusCode = 'Error') as errors, avg(Duration / 1000000000) as avg_duration_s FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE $timeFilter AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND SpanName = 'draft.email' AND SpanAttributes['campaign_id'] != '' $conditionalTest(AND SpanAttributes['campaign_id'] IN (${campaign:singlequote}), $campaign) GROUP BY campaign_id ORDER BY emails DESC

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT ServiceName FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE Timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' ORDER BY ServiceName
list.name: service
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT ServiceName FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE Timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' ORDER BY ServiceName

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT SpanAttributes['gen_ai.request.model'] as model FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE Timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND SpanAttributes['gen_ai.request.model'] != '' ORDER BY model
list.name: model
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT SpanAttributes['gen_ai.request.model'] as model FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE Timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND SpanAttributes['gen_ai.request.model'] != '' ORDER BY model

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT SpanAttributes['gen_ai.agent.name'] as agent FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE Timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND SpanAttributes['gen_ai.agent.name'] != '' ORDER BY agent
list.name: agent
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT SpanAttributes['gen_ai.agent.name'] as agent FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE Timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND SpanAttributes['gen_ai.agent.name'] != '' ORDER BY agent

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT Attributes['gen_ai.provider.name'] as provider FROM infraspec.otel_metrics_sum WHERE TimeUnix > now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND Attributes['gen_ai.provider.name'] != '' ORDER BY provider
list.name: provider
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT Attributes['gen_ai.provider.name'] as provider FROM infraspec.otel_metrics_sum WHERE TimeUnix > now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND Attributes['gen_ai.provider.name'] != '' ORDER BY provider

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT SpanAttributes['campaign_id'] as campaign FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE Timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND SpanAttributes['campaign_id'] != '' ORDER BY campaign
list.name: campaign
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT SpanAttributes['campaign_id'] as campaign FROM infraspec.otel_traces WHERE Timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR AND ServiceName LIKE 'ai%' AND SpanAttributes['campaign_id'] != '' ORDER BY campaign
